apps.name: Cypher Drive
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV HID payload launcher build.

apps.name: Cypher Chat
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV secure-only mesh chat build. Mesh protocol 0x02 uses AES-256-GCM and does not interoperate with plaintext or HMAC-only firmware.

apps.name: Cypher Desk
apps.notes: Offline Cardputer ADV utility suite with notes, calculator, checklist, converters, and scratchpad.

apps.name: Cardputer Tarot
apps.notes: Offline tarot pull, journal, history, and study deck app.

apps.name: Cypher PN532
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV PN532 NFC app using EXT I2C on G8/G9 with SD-backed dumps and return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: Flock You
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV WiFi/BLE detector build with return-to-launcher support.

apps.name: WireTap-32 Cardputer
apps.notes: Cardputer ADV EXT bench build with return-to-launcher support.
